fix_diff: cr_narrow_ci: expand copytree ignore patterns for .devfleet/.trae/coverage/dist/data/vector_data/*.sqlite, cleanup TemporaryDirectory on overlay exceptions, return failed_step=overlay_prepare with structured steps when overlay prep fails. self_maintenance_loop_runner: review/QA prompts now include target branch, base branch, repo URL, fetch instruction, and warning not to inspect the report-only task branch; Para input also carries review_target_branch/base/repo.
root_cause: cr_narrow_ci copied too broad a tree and allowed overlay preparation exceptions to escape without a structured validation step. The report-only review/QA prompt did not pin repo/base/target branch fetch semantics, so QA could compare the report-only workspace branch instead of the employee code branch.
symptom: Self-maintenance review/QA blocks a narrow CI overlay branch: overlay prep lacks structured failure cleanup, copies runtime DB/state, and report-only QA inspects its own empty branch instead of the target branch.
